checks.evidence: Export script loads nucleus_phase_08g_gene_dynamics.blend and does not rebuild the biology layer.
Action layer is separated into gene activation, RNA processing cargo, mRNA export path, and runtime anchors.
All FBX payload files are below the 20 MB Open Cloud create-asset limit.
Assembly target keeps raw packages under Workspace.MeshLibrary/Nucleus_Phase08R_RawPackages.
Assembly script requires Workspace.Nucleus_Model and only replaces Nucleus_Model/GeneDynamics.
ROBLOX_OPEN_CLOUD_API_KEY and ROBLOX_GROUP_ID were not present in the shell environment.

roblox_export_risks: Transparent RNA/path materials need readability validation against the Phase 07R nucleoplasm in Studio.
Runtime anchors are intentionally simple marker geometry and should be converted to invisible Attachments/Beams after import if performance requires it.
Open Cloud upload cannot complete until ROBLOX_OPEN_CLOUD_API_KEY and ROBLOX_GROUP_ID are available to the shell.
decision: FBX export package is ready for Open Cloud upload, but Phase 08R cannot be marked imported until package asset IDs exist.
